message: My uncle is admitted at Medanta Gurugram for a planned knee replacement surgery coming up this Friday. The hospital has asked us to arrange 2 units of O+ blood as a backup before the procedure. Patient is perfectly stable right now. If anyone is available to donate in the Delhi NCR area, please contact me directly.

Need 3 units of A+ blood for my grandfather's scheduled bypass surgery at Apollo Hospital Greams Road, Chennai. The operation is fixed for Wednesday morning. He is currently stable in the ward. If any voluntary donors are nearby and willing to help, please ping me. Thanks.

Regular blood transfusion is scheduled for a thalassemia patient at Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai this Thursday. We require 2 units of B+ blood for the procedure. The child is currently fine but needs the replacement on time. Please DM if you can donate or amplify.

Urgent requirement for B- blood at Fortis Hospital, Bangalore. A relative is undergoing a planned tumor excision surgery in 3 days. The patient is stable but because it is a rarer group, the blood bank asked us to bring replacement donors. Need 1 unit. Please share.

Hi friends, my colleague's mother is admitted at Max Super Speciality Hospital, Saket, Delhi for a scheduled hysterectomy on Friday. They need to arrange 2 units of AB+ blood. She is stable right now. If anyone can volunteer to donate, please let me know so I can connect you.

Requirement for 2 units of O- blood at KEM Hospital, Mumbai. A scheduled orthopedic surgery is planned for Saturday morning. The patient is doing fine but the blood bank is low on negative groups. Any O negative donor available in Mumbai please reply to this tweet.

A friend's father is undergoing a planned gastric surgery at Ruby General Hospital, Kolkata in four days. Doctors have requested 3 units of A- blood to be kept ready. Patient is stable. Since A negative is slightly difficult to find, any leads or donors would be highly appreciated.

We need 2 units of AB- blood for a planned bone marrow transplant procedure at Yashoda Hospital, Secunderabad, Hyderabad. The procedure is scheduled for Friday. Patient is currently stable in the room. Please contact if you can donate or know anyone with this rare group.

My neighbor has a scheduled hernia surgery at Ruby Hall Clinic, Pune this coming Thursday. The doctor has advised us to arrange 1 unit of O+ blood as a standard precaution. He is completely stable. Kindly message me if you are willing to visit the hospital to donate.

Urgent requirement of 2 units of B+ blood for a chemotherapy patient at SMS Hospital, Jaipur. The next scheduled transfusion is day after tomorrow. The patient is currently resting and stable. Please help out if you are in Jaipur and eligible to donate blood.

Arranging 3 units of A+ blood for a routine hip replacement surgery at SGPGI, Lucknow. The surgery is scheduled for Wednesday. The patient is stable and keeping well. If anyone can donate at the SGPGI blood bank, please let me know as soon as possible. Thank you.

Looking for 2 units of O+ blood for my aunt who is admitted at Zydus Hospital, Ahmedabad. She has a planned gallbladder removal surgery scheduled in 3 days. She is stable right now. If any local donors can help us out, please drop a WhatsApp message.

Need 2 units of AB+ blood for a scheduled spinal surgery at Amrita Hospital, Kochi. The operation is planned for Friday morning. The patient is in a stable condition but the hospital requires replacement donors. Please reach out if you can visit the blood bank.

For a planned cardiac procedure at PGIMER Chandigarh, we need to arrange 3 units of B+ blood by Thursday. The patient is currently under observation and completely stable. If anyone is ready to donate at PGI, please contact me immediately. Your help means a lot.

Anemia patient needs a scheduled blood transfusion at AIIMS Bhopal this coming Friday. We require 2 units of A+ blood. The patient is currently stable but requires this regular top-up. Any willing donors in Bhopal please get in touch with me.

My grandfather is scheduled for a prostate surgery at Paras Hospital, Patna on Wednesday. The doctors have asked us to manage 2 units of O+ blood beforehand. He is doing fine and is stable. If anyone can come down to donate, please call me.

Looking for 2 units of B+ blood for a planned kidney stone removal surgery at KG Hospital, Coimbatore. The operation is scheduled for Friday. The patient is stable and resting. Please let me know if anyone is interested in donating. Thank you so much.

Need 2 units of A- blood for a planned ENT surgery at Artemis Hospital, Gurgaon. The surgery is scheduled for Thursday morning. The patient is stable. Since it is a negative blood group, we are looking for donors early. Please DM if you can help.

Arranging blood for a scheduled C-section delivery at Fernandez Hospital, Hyderabad on Friday. We need 2 units of O+ blood as a standard backup. Mother is completely stable and healthy. Please let me know if anyone is free to donate at the hospital.

Requirement for 3 units of B+ blood at Hinduja Hospital, Mumbai for a scheduled colon surgery on Thursday. The patient is stable but needs blood arranged in advance. If anyone can visit the Hinduja blood bank to donate, please drop a message here.

A relative needs 2 units of AB+ blood for a planned orthopedic procedure at Manipal Hospital, Bangalore. The surgery is fixed for Saturday. Patient is perfectly stable. Kindly connect with me if you are available to donate blood in Bangalore.

We require 2 units of O- blood for a planned vascular surgery at MIOT International, Chennai. The operation is scheduled in 4 days. Patient is stable but blood bank requires replacement for negative groups. Please reach out if you can volunteer.

Need 2 units of A+ blood for a dialysis patient's scheduled routine transfusion at Jehangir Hospital, Pune. The procedure is day after tomorrow. Patient is currently stable. If anyone is looking to donate blood this week, please contact us.

Planned eye surgery backup at Narayana Nethralaya, Bangalore. Need 1 unit of B+ blood arranged by Wednesday. The patient is an elderly citizen but completely stable. Please reach out if you can visit the center to donate.

My cousin has a planned plastic surgery scheduled for Friday at Belle Vue Clinic, Kolkata. We need to arrange 2 units of O+ blood as requested by the surgeon. Patient is stable. Please get in touch if you are available to donate.

Annual Mega Blood Donation Camp organized by Rotary Club Delhi at Central Park, Connaught Place this Sunday from 9 AM to 5 PM. Free certificates and refreshments for all voluntary donors. Come forward to save lives! Let's do our bit for society.

A huge thank you to Mr. Ramesh Kumar who came down to Apollo Hospital, Mumbai today to donate blood for my father. The surgery went well and he is recovering nicely. Truly grateful for this kind gesture! People like you keep humanity alive.

Quick question to the group: Can someone donate blood if they recently got a tattoo? My friend wants to donate in an upcoming drive in Bangalore but got inked about 2 months ago. What are the official guidelines regarding this in India?

Lion's Club Chennai is organizing a voluntary blood donor registration drive at T-Nagar association hall this Saturday. Registering yourself helps blood banks find you easily during emergencies. Please bring an ID card. Timing 10 AM onwards.

Did you know that one single unit of donated blood can save up to three lives? Blood donation also helps in reducing the donor's risk of heart disease and maintains iron levels. Be a hero, donate blood regularly at your nearest authorized blood bank in Kolkata.

Information update: The Blood Bank at Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS), Hyderabad has confirmed they have sufficient stock of O+ and B+ plasma right now, but they are looking for voluntary O- and AB- donors for inventory building. Contact them for details.
hospital: Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences, Hyderabad

message: Great news! Our college NSS unit at Pune University successfully collected 150 units of blood during yesterday's drive. Big shoutout to all the student donors and medical staff from AFMC Pune who supported this noble cause. Photos uploaded on our portal.

Is it safe for someone with mild hypertension to donate blood? My uncle wants to attend the blood donation camp in Jaipur next week. His blood pressure is under control with regular medication. Any doctor or expert here can advise on eligibility?

Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute (SGPGI) Lucknow is hosting a blood awareness seminar and donation drive on World Blood Donor Day. Venue: Main Auditorium, SGPGI. Time: 11:00 AM. Free health check-up and blood grouping for all visitors.

Heartfelt thanks to the unknown donor who provided A- blood at Red Cross Society Ahmedabad for my sister's delivery yesterday. Because of your timely donation, both mother and baby are absolutely safe and doing great. God bless you!

Blood Donation Drive happening this Friday at Infopark, Kochi. Organized by IMA Blood Bank in association with tech communities. IT professionals, please step out during your breaks and donate blood. Every drop matters. Location: Athulya Hall.

Can someone share the contact number or working hours for the government blood bank at GMCH Sector 32, Chandigarh? I need to verify their standard replacement donor exchange rules for an upcoming procedure next month. Thanks in advance.

Youth Club of Bhopal is managing a blood donor database for emergency requirements. If you live in Bhopal and wish to register as an active volunteer donor, please fill out the Google Form link below. Let us build a strong network for emergencies.

General Alert: Many people face weakness after donating blood because they don't hydrate. Always drink plenty of water and have a heavy snack before you donate. Avoid strenuous physical activity for 24 hours post-donation. Stay safe, stay healthy!

Special blood donation camp being organized at PSG Tech campus, Coimbatore on Tuesday. The camp is managed by Government Hospital Blood Bank teams. All college students and locals are invited to participate. Timings: 9:30 AM to 3:30 PM.

I would like to express my gratitude to the two youngsters from Delhi University who answered our call and donated B- blood at Max Hospital Saket last evening. Your kindness saved my family from immense stress. Thank you so much!

Does anyone know if there is a cooling-off period for blood donation after receiving a standard typhoid vaccination shot? Planning to attend a local housing society drive in Mumbai this Sunday. Let me know if you are aware of the medical rules.

Blood donation drive alert! Rotary Club Bangalore is setting up a mobile blood donation bus at standard spots near MG Road Metro Station tomorrow from 10 AM to 6 PM. If you are shopping or traveling via MG Road, please spare 15 minutes to save a life.

A polite reminder that regular blood donation is highly beneficial for regulating blood viscosity and keeping your iron stores balanced. Think of it as a routine detox that gives someone a second lease of life. Visit any blood bank in Chennai today!

Our NGO is updating the emergency contact list of rare blood group donors (O-, AB-, A-, B-) across Kolkata region. If you belong to these groups and are comfortable being reached out to during absolute emergencies, please reply to this post.

Shoutout to the staff at Gandhi Hospital Blood Bank, Hyderabad. Visited today for a voluntary donation and the process was incredibly clean, professional, and took just 20 minutes. Highly recommend everyone to visit and donate whenever possible.

To commemorate independence week, a joint blood donation camp is scheduled at Sahakari Hall, Pune this coming Saturday. The drive will be monitored by Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital blood bank. Free health check reports will be sent via email to all.

Are women allowed to donate blood during their menstrual cycle? Getting conflicting opinions on search results. There is a blood camp at our corporate office in Jaipur day after tomorrow and I want to be sure before registering. Thanks.

Thank you very much to the tech community members who shared our request for AB+ blood last week. The surgery at Medanta Lucknow went smoothly and the patient was discharged yesterday morning. Your online support saved us in time.

Public notice: The Red Cross Blood Bank in Ahmedabad has reported a seasonal dip in all positive blood group stocks due to severe summer heat limiting voluntary walk-ins. If you are eligible, please visit their Ashram Road center to donate today.
